calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Kathleen S. Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: City & County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witnesses Jennifer Jennings & Peter Wu were present, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Defendant Parvinder Singh.
Default entered against Defendant - 07/27/07.
Doe Defendants dismissed - 01/15/08.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Parvinder Singh as follows:
Damages/Principal $17,164.29
Costs $245.00, for a total of $17,409.29.
Judgment signed in open court.
